title: Censorship of US presidential Candidate by the Biden Administration (White House Office of the National Cyber Director)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any information regarding my censorship ordered by the us govt/xtakedown and/or referenced is US Department of Justice, Homeland Security
Agency case number: 17 GJ 1158
Court: United States District Court, Northern District of Illinois in regards to facebook/meta twitter/x and any research, or investigative materials, including dates, times, and other departments including general known Biden Admin censorship units, involved regarding Floyd Zedy Yancey aka Azrael Aka Death as this pertains to silencing political opposition and is against free speech and contrary to law.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Floyd Yancey
